scores.correctness_notes: Correctly covers loki type, location URL format, services/labels fields, and pebble_service auto-label. However, critically omits the required `override` field (merge/replace) from layer YAML, and incorrectly claims loki is the 'only supported type currently' — the gold standard documents three types: loki, opentelemetry (OTLP), and syslog (RFC 5424). Missing the full protocol options table is a significant gap.
scores.hallucination_notes: Go-template label syntax ({{ .Metadata.UnitName }}) does not match gold standard which uses $ENV_VAR style substitution — this appears to be from a Juju charm library layer, not native Pebble. The claim that loki is the 'only supported type' is factually wrong. The 'no replan needed' note is unverified. Charm library content (LogProxyConsumer, loki-push-api) may be accurate but is outside the scope of the question and introduces unverifiable specifics.
